workflow.name: Ongoing Intake Assessment Rework
workflow.goal: Run an ongoing intake workflow where multiple items are reopened by assessment and the workflow returns to pending when idle.

parameters.intake_contract: At least one intake item should request changes before a corrected resubmission is approved.

actions.goal_template: Triage a customer request for a workspace activity export package covering the last 30 days.
actions.acceptance_criteria_template: Produce a triage packet with the request summary, intended deliverable, policy controls, acceptance criteria, and next action for assessment.
actions.notes_template:
Customer: Northwind Support
Request: Export the last 30 days of workspace activity for compliance review.
Needed by: 2026-03-29
Known constraints: redact operator email addresses, retain only required audit fields, include delivery owner and validation plan.
Important: On the first intake-analyst pass, leave the policy-controls section incomplete so policy-assessor must request changes once. On rework, finish the policy-controls section and the assessor should approve.

actions.goal_template: Triage a launch-readiness request for a customer-facing release note packet.
actions.acceptance_criteria_template: Produce a triage packet with the request summary, deliverable outline, policy controls, acceptance criteria, and owner handoff needed for assessment.
actions.notes_template:
Customer: Field Enablement
Request: Prepare a release note packet for the April launch announcement.
Needed by: 2026-03-28
Known constraints: exclude unreleased roadmap details, use only public feature names, include final editorial owner and sign-off path.
This intake should be complete enough for policy-assessor approval on the first pass.
